purpose: Define the future offline boundary from unified_market_evidence_request_validation.v1 to unified_market_evidence_orchestration_plan.v1; this contract confers no execution authorization.

input.planning_timestamp_policy: The pure planner receives a caller-supplied RFC3339 UTC timestamp or a fixed test timestamp; wall-clock time is never read implicitly and the timestamp is excluded from semantic plan identity.

canonical_hash_rule.serialization: UTF-8 JSON with ensure_ascii=false, sort_keys=true, separators=(',', ':'), allow_nan=false; SHA-256 lowercase hexadecimal digest
canonical_hash_rule.original_request_hash: hash the schema-valid AI-authored request artifact
canonical_hash_rule.normalized_request_hash: hash the canonical normalized semantic planning scope; request lifecycle/presentation-only metadata is excluded
canonical_hash_rule.f3_validation_output_hash: hash the complete schema-valid F3 validation output
canonical_hash_rule.plan_id: umeop-v1- plus first 20 hexadecimal characters of SHA-256 canonical plan identity scope
canonical_hash_rule.plan_hash: SHA-256 of canonical plan identity scope excluding plan_id, planning timestamp, warnings, and presentation text
canonical_hash_rule.operation_id: deterministic umeop-op-v1- plus first 20 hexadecimal characters of SHA-256 canonical operation identity scope; scope includes capability_id, canonical target IDs, market, security types, normalized parameters, executor_id, batch key, and expected evidence contract

whole_plan_blockers: validation_status is invalid, requires_clarification, or unsupported
any target is not resolved, including ambiguous, not_found, market_mismatch, unsupported_market, unsupported_security_type, invalid_input, duplicate, or quarantined
any required capability is unsupported, invalid_parameters, unknown, requires_target_resolution, or has a blocked route
planning_eligibility.optional_capability_policy: Optional unsupported, unknown, invalid-parameter, or blocked capabilities are omitted with a deterministic warning after all whole-plan blockers have been excluded.
planning_eligibility.provisional_policy: A provisional capability result is emitted only as plan_only_not_executable; it has no executor invocation, network request estimate, approval artifact, or authorization eligibility.
planning_eligibility.contract_supported_policy: contract_supported but non-runtime-executable capability results are plan_only_not_executable and never executable.
planning_eligibility.session_status_policy: session_status is blocked until a governed executor can bind the complete current clock, calendar, and authoritative closure-evidence route. Local supplied-evidence calculations may be referenced but do not clear this blocker.
planning_eligibility.derived_capability_policy: identity, source_currentness, and evidence_quality link to resolved canonical targets or upstream evidence operations; they never create independent network invocations.

operation_record_proposal.authorization_statement: No operation status in this contract authorizes execution. executable_pending_approval only means projection found a governed candidate route.

ordering_and_batching.canonical_order: Sort logical operations by (capability order in normalized data_needs, market order TWSE,TPEX,TAIFEX, executor_id, canonical target ID tuple, canonical parameter JSON, batch key). Never rely on dictionary insertion order.
ordering_and_batching.batch_key: SHA-256 canonical tuple of executor_id, capability_id, market, compatible normalized parameters, output evidence contract, network/approval requirements; targets only join when executor contract supports the group.

accounting.logical_operation_count: count of non-omitted projected capability/target or capability/market operations
accounting.batch_group_count: count of deterministic batch keys for executable operations
accounting.executor_invocation_count: one planned invocation per executable batch group unless a selected executor contract declares another bound
accounting.network_request_estimate: sum of bounded executor-specific request estimates; null when unknown, never inferred from logical operation count
accounting.evidence_bundle_count: one aggregate evidence bundle per plan execution attempt; zero for a plan-only or blocked plan

partial_plan_policy.mixed_executable_and_plan_only: emit plan_ready_with_warnings only when all required capabilities are executable or valid derived operations; otherwise plan_only_not_executable
partial_plan_policy.independently_approvable_subplans: not designed in v1; strictest operation controls the single package

package_approval_composition.rule: The package requires owner approval when any executable operation requires execution approval; use strictest_operation_controls_package. Derived capability fields do not invent approval and may inherit an approved upstream package.
package_approval_composition.approval_boundary: F3 valid does not authorize execution. A plan_ready status does not authorize execution. Only M8R-05B-02 owner authorization bound to immutable plan inputs may enable M8R-05B-03.

authorization_and_execution_boundary.05b_02_responsibility: produce owner-review package and immutable single-use authorization bound to plan_hash, executor IDs, targets, parameters, output scope, catalog/security-master/routing/contract hashes, expiry, and allowed retry policy
authorization_and_execution_boundary.replay_and_retry: 05B-02 owns authoritative single-use consumption and replay prevention. 05B-03 must reject expired, consumed, scope-drifted, or hash-mismatched authorization; retry needs an explicit unconsumed/reissued authorization policy.
authorization_and_execution_boundary.evidence_aggregation: 05B-03 alone aggregates executor receipts into one bounded evidence bundle, preserving operation IDs, source/evidence references, timestamps, failures, and omissions. The planner aggregates no runtime evidence.

draft_plan_schema_proposal.production_schema_location: Not created in schemas/ during preflight; M8R-05B-01 must establish a production schema only after this design contract is accepted.
